text.fullText: If the FMCSA is not going to prohibit brokers from adding language to a contract that prohibits a carrier from seeing the documents per Part 371.3 then the revision will have little effect.  The NCCDB doesn't have provisions for carriers to file complaints against brokers.  How does the FMCSA handle broker complaints now?  Based on the language in the Federal Register, OOIDA and SBTA must find a House of Representatives member to submit a bill to modify the law/s applicable to brokers.
